sql:
SELECT RF_PLI_009_CarteraGobCLF.Fec_Pro, RF_PLI_009_CarteraGobCLF.Cod_Emp, RF_PLI_009_CarteraGobCLF.Moneda, RF_PLI_009_CarteraGobCLF.Cod_Pro, RF_PLI_009_CarteraGobCLF.Cod_Sub_Pro, RF_PLI_009_CarteraGobCLF.Nemotecnico, RF_PLI_009_CarteraGobCLF.Instrumento, RF_PLI_009_CarteraGobCLF.VP_Cap_Amort, RF_PLI_009_CarteraGobCLF.VP_Int_Total, RF_PLI_009_CarteraGobCLF.Dias_Vcto, (RF_PLI_009_CarteraGobCLF.VP_Cap_Amort+RF_PLI_009_CarteraGobCLF.VP_Int_Total)/RF_PLI_010_CarteraGobCLF_MonTotal.VP_Flujo AS Ponderador INTO RF_CarteraGobCLF_Pond
FROM RF_PLI_009_CarteraGobCLF INNER JOIN RF_PLI_010_CarteraGobCLF_MonTotal ON (RF_PLI_009_CarteraGobCLF.Cod_Pro = RF_PLI_010_CarteraGobCLF_MonTotal.Cod_Pro) AND (RF_PLI_009_CarteraGobCLF.Moneda = RF_PLI_010_CarteraGobCLF_MonTotal.Moneda);
